parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ items: [{ un_number: $('Set Input').item.json.un_number, quantity: Number($('Set Input').item.json.quantity) }] }) }}

nodes.name: ✅ Exempt — Send Confirmation
nodes.notes: Connect to Slack, Email, or webhook to send the exempt notification. The summary text is in $json.summary

nodes.name: ❌ Not Exempt — Flag for Review
nodes.notes: Connect to Slack, Email, or webhook to alert that full ADR compliance is required. The summary text is in $json.summary
